module_map.responsibility: Metadata collection and representation. Collects file system information (ownership, permissions, dates, sizes, symlinks, git status) and organizes it into Meta struct instances. Entry point for all file property extraction.
key_types: Meta (central data type containing all file attributes)

module_map.responsibility: Command-line argument parsing and configuration aggregation. Defines CLI flags, config file integration, and settings for display layout (blocks), sorting, icons, colors, permissions, and filtering. Bridges CLI and internal representation.
submodules: blocks.rs (Block enum: Permission, User, Group, Size, Date, Name, INode, Links, GitStatus columns)
layout.rs (DisplayOption: grid, tree, one per line)

module_map.responsibility: Visual theming for output. Manages icon themes, color themes, and git status visualization through ColorTheme and IconTheme enums loaded from configuration files or system defaults.
submodules: color.rs (ColorTheme enum, color mappings for file types)

module_map.responsibility: Color resolution and application. Elem enum captures file properties (permission, filetype, git status). Colors struct wraps ThemeOption and applies styling to strings via the colorize() method.
key_types: Elem (Permission, Attributes, FileType, GitStatus, Symlink, Date, Size)

module_map.responsibility: Icon resolution. Icons struct manages icon theme and applies icons via get() method based on Name (filetype, extension, name patterns).

Output formatting and layout. Orchestrates grid/tree display, applies sorting, resolves padding, adds headers, and formats each file entry into a displayable string. Grid and tree functions are public entry points. inner_display_grid and inner_display_tree do the heavy lifting.
Sorting operations. Defines SortFn type and implements comparators for each SortColumn (Size, Extension, Date, Name, etc.) with Asc/Desc support.
Main orchestrator. Core struct coordinates the workflow: fetch (metadata collection), sort (apply sorting), display (format output). Bridges flags, icons, colors, themes, and display.
Configuration file parsing and merging. Loads Config from YAML/TOML, merges with CLI flags (CLI takes precedence), and provides defaults.

data_flow.description: Collects file system metadata from a path. Calls submodules (name.rs, permissions.rs, date.rs, owner.rs, size.rs, filetype.rs, symlink.rs, indicator.rs, inode.rs, links.rs, git_file_status.rs, access_control.rs) to populate Meta struct fields. Returns fully populated Meta instance.
types_produced: Meta { name, path, permissions_or_attributes, date, owner, file_type, size, symlink, indicator, inode, links, content (if dir), access_control, git_status }

data_flow.description: If Meta is a directory and recursion is enabled, calls from_path on all entries, populating the content: Option<Vec<Meta>> field. Uses GitCache if git_status flag is set.
types_produced: Meta with content field populated with child Meta instances

data_flow.key_function: Core::sort(&self, metas: &mut Vec<Meta>) -> calls sort::compare() with SortFn from flags.sort_orders
data_flow.description: Sorts metas vector using SortFn comparators from flags.sort_orders (Vec of (SortOrder, SortFn) tuples). sort.rs implements comparators per SortColumn: Extension, Name, Size, Modified, Created, Version, etc.
For each Meta.name, resolves icon string via theme-based lookup (by extension, name pattern, or file type). Returns icon string (e.g., '📁' for dir, '📄' for file).
For each element of a file entry (permission, filetype, git status, size, date), resolves color via Elem enum matching. Applies ContentStyle from theme to string. Returns ColoredString (ANSI styled).

data_flow.key_function: display::grid(metas, flags, colors, icons, git_theme) -> String (or tree())
data_flow.description: Orchestrates layout. For each Meta in metas: calls get_output() to produce Vec<String> (cells), one per Block (columns). Computes padding via get_padding_rules(). Applies Icons::get() and Colors::colorize() for icons/colors. For tree layout, adds tree_depth_prefix and structure. Returns formatted output string.

data_flow.key_function: Core::display(&self, metas: &[Meta]) -> calls display::grid() or display::tree()
data_flow.description: Prints the formatted output string via print_output macro.

cross_module_hubs.reason: Display is the final output hub. Imports: Meta (core data), Flags (configuration), Colors (styling), Icons (icon resolution), OwnerCache (owner name dedup), DisplayOption (layout type), Block (column types), FileType (file classification). Outbound: directly calls sort, colorize, icon resolution. Every file listing passes through here.

Meta is the central data type. Imported by: core.rs, display.rs, sort.rs, icon.rs (Name field), color.rs (via Elem enum match on Meta fields), flags/ (for metadata validation), git.rs (for git status integration). Outbound: depends on submodules (name, date, owner, size, filetype, symlink, permissions, indicator, links), flags (PermissionFlag, Display, Layout), git (GitCache). Every file system operation produces Meta.

Blocks (and Block enum) define columns. Imported by: core.rs, display.rs (add_header, get_output, padding rules), color.rs (Block::get_header for column coloring), icon.rs (Block presence affects icon display), sort.rs (SortColumn correlates to Block), config_file.rs (Blocks configuration parsing). Outbound: depends on Cli, Config (for parsing), Configurable trait. Block::get_header() is called in display to add headers.

change_proposal.title: Add file checksum display column (SHA-256)
change_proposal.summary: Add a SHA-256 checksum column to file listings. This requires: (1) new Block::Checksum enum variant, (2) Checksum metadata type in meta/checksum.rs, (3) integration into Meta struct, (4) color/theme support, (5) display formatting, (6) CLI flag and config option.
files_to_modify: src/flags/blocks.rs (add Block::Checksum variant, add 'checksum' string parsing in try_from, add to long() method)
src/meta/mod.rs (add checksum field to Meta struct, initialize in from_path)
src/meta/checksum.rs (NEW FILE: Checksum type, compute_sha256(path: &Path) -> io::Result<String>)
src/flags/mod.rs (add Flags field or update Blocks configuration to include checksum)
src/display.rs (handle Block::Checksum in get_output() function, add checksum value formatting)
src/color.rs (add Elem::Checksum variant to color enum, add color mapping in get_color() method)
src/theme/color.rs (add ColorTheme support for Checksum element)
src/flags/display.rs (update DisplayOption to include checksum-related flags if needed)
src/config_file.rs (update Config struct to support 'checksum' block in YAML/TOML)
src/main.rs (add CLI flag for --checksum or include in --long)
new_types: Checksum struct: { value: String, algorithm: &'static str = "SHA256" }
Elem::Checksum variant in color.rs Elem enum
change_proposal.pattern_to_follow: Follow the Size column pattern: (1) Size is a Block variant. (2) Size has its own meta/size.rs module with Size struct and formatting logic. (3) Size is computed in Meta::from_path() via meta::size::Size::new(). (4) Colors are mapped via Elem::Size in color.rs. (5) Display formatting in display.rs checks for Block::Size and applies padding/alignment. (6) Config file supports 'size' block name. Use identical pattern for Checksum: meta/checksum.rs with Checksum::new(path: &Path) -> io::Result<Checksum> computing SHA-256, Elem::Checksum mapping, Block::Checksum column, etc.
change_proposal.integration_point: Checksum computation (meta/checksum.rs) is heavy I/O and should be lazy/optional. Add it to Meta only when Block::Checksum is requested in flags.blocks. In display.rs get_output(), check if Block::Checksum is in flags.blocks; if yes, read checksum from Meta.checksum (populated in from_path if block is enabled). In core.rs, pass flags to Meta::from_path or compute checksum separately based on flags. Color mapping in color.rs Elem::Checksum is straightforward: use theme default (white) or config override. No breaking change to core pipeline; checksum is optional column.
risks: I/O Performance: SHA-256 computation on every file is expensive. Mitigation: make it opt-in via flag, consider caching/memoization for repeated directory listings.
Large file handling: reading entire file into memory for hashing may exhaust memory on huge files. Mitigation: stream hash computation using sha2 crate's incremental API.
Cross-platform: Windows and Unix may have different file access permissions. Mitigation: use std::fs::File with proper error handling (follow existing pattern in meta/permissions.rs).

Display width: SHA-256 is 64 hex chars; can exceed terminal width. Mitigation: truncation or abbreviation (show first 8 chars) with ellipsis, aligned with --truncate-owner pattern in flags/truncate_owner.rs.

Config compatibility: existing config files won't have 'checksum' block; ensure backward compatibility. Mitigation: Block::Checksum is optional, default is not included. Existing configs work unchanged.
Theme completeness: ColorTheme must support Checksum element. Mitigation: add Checksum to all built-in themes (no-color, default, custom), default to white/gray if missing.

tool_usage.result: Directory tree showing 47 Rust files, LOC/function/class counts per file. Identified core modules: core.rs (5 functions), display.rs (25 functions), meta/mod.rs (9 functions), flags/blocks.rs (52 functions), color.rs (17 functions), icon.rs (13 functions), sort.rs (18 functions).

Extracted Meta struct fields (name, path, permissions_or_attributes, date, owner, file_type, size, symlink, indicator, inode, links, content, access_control, git_status) and key methods: from_path (metadata factory), recurse_into (directory recursion), calculate_total_size.

Extracted display.rs functions: grid, tree (entry points), inner_display_grid, inner_display_tree, get_output (cell formatting), get_padding_rules, add_header, get_visible_width. Identified import of Meta, Flags, Colors, Icons, DisplayOption, Block types.
Extracted Core struct methods: new, run (orchestrator), fetch (metadata collection), sort (sorting), display (output). Identified imports of Meta, Flags, Icons, Colors, GitTheme, sort module.

Extracted Blocks struct and Block enum. Block variants: Permission, User, Group, Context, Size, SizeValue, Date, Name, INode, Links, GitStatus. Blocks methods: long(), contains_inode(), optional_prepend_inode(), configure_from(cli, config), from_cli(), from_config(). No Checksum variant present.
Extracted Icons struct: new(tty, when, theme, icon_separator) -> Self, get(name: &Name) -> String. Depends on Name (meta field), FileType (from meta), SymLink (from meta). No checksum icon mapping.

Extracted Colors struct and Elem enum. Elem variants: Permission, Attributes, FileType, GitStatus, Symlink, Date, Size, INode, Links. Colors methods: colorize(input, elem), get_color(elem, theme), style_from_path(path). No Elem::Checksum variant.

Identified modules importing from meta: core.rs (Meta), sort.rs (Meta), icon.rs (FileType, Name), display.rs (Meta, FileType, OwnerCache), color.rs (via Elem enum), git.rs (GitFileStatus). Confirmed meta/ is central hub.

Core.rs imports: Colors, display, Flags (with SortOrder, SortFn), GitCache, Icons, Meta, print_output. Sort.rs imports: Flags (SortColumn, SortOrder), Meta, std::cmp::Ordering, vsort::compare. Confirmed sort is downstream of flags, upstream of display.
